prompt: I'm building an autocomplete feature and need to match user input against ~100k strings as they type. Needs to feel instant (<50ms). What's the best approach?

assertions.name: has_constraint_summary
assertions.description: Begins with understanding problem constraints before recommending

assertions.name: has_tradeoff_table
assertions.description: Contains comparison table with at least 2 data structure/algorithm options

assertions.name: has_complexity_analysis
assertions.description: States time and space complexity with justification, not just O() notation

assertions.name: has_pseudocode
assertions.description: Includes pseudocode or structured algorithm steps

assertions.name: has_edge_cases
assertions.description: Identifies at least 2 edge cases or correctness pitfalls
